title: Two-thirds vote favoring change required
doc_html:
§145.  Two-thirds vote favoring change required

If two-thirds of the total vote cast at the election in each parish is in favor of the ordinance changing the boundary line, then the boundary line shall be changed as set forth in the ordinance.
doc_text:
§145.  Two-thirds vote favoring change required
If two-thirds of the total vote cast at the election in each parish is in favor of the ordinance changing the boundary line, then the boundary line shall be changed as set forth in the ordinance.
